mapper.select: SELECT s.STD_USER_ID AS studentId, m.USER_NAME AS studentName, s.ENRL_SCHL_NM AS enrlSchlNm, cl.CLASS_SN AS classSn, cl.CLASS_NM AS classroomName, instr_m.USER_NAME AS instructorName, TO_CHAR(cm.REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS enrollStartDate, ( SELECT ROUND( ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_ATTENDANCE a WHERE a.STD_USER_ID = s.STD_USER_ID AND TRIM(a.ATND_TYPE_CD) IN ('01','03','04') AND TRUNC(a.ATND_REG_DT) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT TRUNC(sa2.ATND_REG_DT) FROM STUDENT_ATTENDANCE sa2 JOIN CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm3 ON cm3.USER_ID = sa2.STD_USER_ID WHERE cm3.CLASS_SN = cl.CLASS_SN AND cm3.ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' ) ) * 100.0 / NULLIF( ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT TRUNC(sa2.ATND_REG_DT)) FROM STUDENT_ATTENDANCE sa2 JOIN CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm3 ON cm3.USER_ID = sa2.STD_USER_ID WHERE cm3.CLASS_SN = cl.CLASS_SN AND cm3.ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' ), 0 ) ) FROM DUAL ) AS attendanceRate, ( SELECT ROUND( COUNT(asub.ASGMT_SN) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(ab.ASGMT_SN), 0) ) FROM ASSIGNMENT_BOARD ab LEFT JOIN ASSIGNMENT_SUBMIT asub ON ab.ASGMT_SN = asub.ASGMT_SN AND asub.SBMT_USER_ID = s.STD_USER_ID WHERE ab.CLASS_SN = cl.CLASS_SN ) AS assignmentRate, ( SELECT ROUND(AVG(et.TOT_SCORE), 1) FROM EXAM_TAKER et JOIN EXAM e ON et.EXAM_SN = e.EXAM_SN WHERE et.STD_USER_ID = s.STD_USER_ID AND e.CLASS_SN = cl.CLASS_SN AND et.TOT_SCORE IS NOT NULL ) AS recentExamAvgScore FROM STUDENT s JOIN MEMBER m ON s.STD_USER_ID = m.USER_ID JOIN CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm ON cm.USER_ID = s.STD_USER_ID AND cm.ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' JOIN CLASSROOM cl ON cm.CLASS_SN = cl.CLASS_SN JOIN COURSE c ON cl.COURSE_SN = c.COURSE_SN JOIN MEMBER instr_m ON c.INSTR_USER_ID = instr_m.USER_ID WHERE s.PRNT_USER_ID = #{parentId} ORDER BY m.USER_NAME, cm.REG_DT DESC
